mnemonics: G.R.E.E.N. R.O.I. - Generate Renewable Energy, Employ E-waste strategies, Optimize Infrastructure Naturally for a Return On Investment in sustainability.
keyPoints: Focus on energy efficiency in data centers and devices.
Implement responsible e-waste recycling and circular economy principles.
Use sustainability metrics (like PUE) to measure and improve IT's environmental impact.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on initial cost rather than Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) which includes energy consumption.
Overlooking the full lifecycle of IT equipment, from manufacturing to disposal.
